commits.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Document</title>
</head>
<body>
   <script>console.log(2+8);</script>
<button onclick="window.print()">Print this page</button>
</body>
</html>
